title: GOOD: IVK key material comment at derivation site
description: At the point where bob_ivk_bytes is derived in testnet_shielded_payment_end_to_end(), a comment states: 'The IVK bytes are key material; they must not be logged.' The variable is then used only to construct SaplingIvkDecryptor and is not passed to any tracing macro. The comment is load-bearing documentation of an invariant that could otherwise be violated by a future contributor adding debug logging. It is placed at the derivation site rather than in a distant doc comment, so it is visible at the point of risk.
